items.description: True alarms flow continuously between Talos and VAS without interruption, verified stable over an extended period.
items.title: Continuous alarm flow

items.description: Assigning a live alarm in Talos causes it to appear simultaneously in both Map and Salvo views.
items.title: Operator alarm workflow across Map & Salvo

items.description: When an alarm fires, only cameras mapped to the alarm's zone stream automatically. Falls back to all cameras when no zone match.
items.title: Alarm-triggered streaming with zone logic

items.description: Assigning a motion alarm in Talos automatically opens the alarm workflow and loads the corresponding quad in Salvo.
items.title: Multi-monitor quad view integration

items.description: Operators can drag a site or device into the Salvo grid. Dropping a second item onto an occupied slot replaces the first stream.
items.title: Drag and drop for Salvo

items.description: The Evalink Talos configuration form now prevents saving when Company ID or API Token are empty.
items.title: CMS form validation

items.description: Added inline help explaining where to generate the token in Talos and what permission scope is required.
items.title: API Token field guidance

items.description: Invalid or malformed Company ID and API Token values are now rejected with validation feedback.
items.title: Credential format validation

items.description: Site form now requires DC09 Account ID when a DC09 CMS is configured at tenant level.
items.title: DC09 Account ID requirement

items.description: System now detects and blocks duplicate DC09 Account ID assignments to prevent alarm routing conflicts.
items.title: Duplicate DC09 Account ID prevention

items.description: Added guidance on site forms explaining where to obtain the Account ID from the CMS.
items.title: DC09 Account ID guidance

items.description: CMS configuration now validates IP address and port format before saving.
items.title: IP/port validation

items.description: CMS-specific required fields are now enforced on save.
items.title: CMS-specific fields enforcement

items.description: Validation errors now properly prevent the save action from completing.
items.title: Validation errors block saving

items.description: Error messages now clearly state which field is invalid and what correction is required.
items.title: Actionable error messages

items.description: Privileges panel now groups privileges logically with clear labels, removing duplicates.
items.title: Privilege categories organization

items.description: Deny override now properly takes precedence over global grant for that privilege on a specific entity.
items.title: Deny override precedence

summary: AutoStream feature release, multi-monitor workflow improvements, and comprehensive bug fixes for DC09 CMS integration and permissions system.

items.description: Devices within a site can be added, deleted, activated, deactivated, and rediscovered. Rediscovery re-adds a previously deleted device including its sensors.
items.title: Device lifecycle management

items.description: Sites can be created and deleted under a customer, toggled on/off, and added in multiples. Deactivating a site suspends all nested devices and sensors.
items.title: Site lifecycle management

items.description: Sensors within a device can be added, deleted, activated, and deactivated individually. The same sensor type can be assigned across multiple devices.
items.title: Sensor lifecycle management

items.description: Customers can be created, deleted, and toggled active/inactive. Toggling a service provider propagates status down to all nested entities.
items.title: Customer & service provider management

items.description: Admins can create named device groups in the Configuration menu and assign specific devices from a site to a group.
items.title: Device group creation

items.description: Roles can be created with a name, entities, and privileges in a single page, saved successfully, and persist across logout/login.
items.title: Role creation & persistence

items.description: Creating two roles with the same name within the same tenant is blocked with case-insensitive check.
items.title: Duplicate role name prevention

items.description: Selecting a parent entity auto-selects all its children. Deselecting a parent clears all children.
items.title: Entity tree parent/child selection

items.description: The privilege list updates in real-time as entities are selected or deselected.
items.title: Dynamic privilege filtering by entity

items.description: Admins can assign roles from a user's profile or in bulk to a group. Assignments complete within 5 seconds.
items.title: Role assignment to users & groups

items.description: Admins can view a user's full effective permissions showing direct roles, group roles, and merged result.
items.title: Effective permissions view

items.description: Admins can add grant or deny overrides for a specific entity within a role.
items.title: Permission overrides per entity

items.description: A specific privilege can be excluded for an individual user without touching their role.
items.title: User-level privilege exclusions

items.description: The Alarm Management System category in the Marketplace lists all supported CMS options with configured state.
items.title: Marketplace CMS listing

items.description: Valid Company ID and API Token can be saved for Evalink Talos. Token is stored securely.
items.title: Evalink Talos credential save

items.description: The DC09 Account ID field is visible and editable on site forms, required when forwarding alarms to DC09 CMS.
items.title: DC09 Account ID field on site forms

items.description: Sites can optionally provide an encryption key. When set, DC09 alarm messages are sent encrypted.
items.title: Optional encryption key for DC09 alarms

summary: Configuration management overhaul, complete RBAC system, and DC09 CMS integration for alarm management.
